divisions.title: Christ Superior to All
divisions.summary: Christ is superior to angels and Moses, the ultimate revelation of God, our great high priest who sympathizes with our weaknesses

divisions.title: Christ's Priesthood
divisions.summary: Jesus is a high priest in the order of Melchizedek, not Aaron, warning against falling away, hope as an anchor for the soul

divisions.title: Faith and Sacrifice
divisions.theme: The new covenant and Christ's once-for-all sacrifice
divisions.summary: Jesus mediates a better covenant, entered the heavenly tabernacle with his own blood, his sacrifice perfects believers forever

divisions.title: Call to Persevere
divisions.summary: The hall of faith, fix eyes on Jesus who endured the cross, pursue holiness, offer sacrifices of praise to God

chapterSummaries.1: God has spoken through his Son, who is superior to angels
chapterSummaries.2: Pay attention to salvation, Jesus made like us to defeat death
chapterSummaries.3: Jesus is greater than Moses, warning against hardening hearts
chapterSummaries.4: Enter God's rest through faith, the living and active word of God
chapterSummaries.5: Jesus appointed high priest, called according to Melchizedek
chapterSummaries.6: Press on to maturity, God's unchangeable promise, hope as an anchor
chapterSummaries.7: Melchizedek's priesthood, Jesus our eternal high priest
chapterSummaries.8: Jesus mediates a new covenant, written on hearts
chapterSummaries.9: Christ entered heaven itself with his own blood
chapterSummaries.10: One sacrifice perfects forever, draw near with confidence
chapterSummaries.11: Faith defined, examples of faith from Abel to the prophets
chapterSummaries.12: Run the race, Jesus the founder and perfecter of faith, discipline as proof of sonship
chapterSummaries.13: Love, hospitality, contentment, obey leaders, offer sacrifices of praise
